constants.const: If a picture supports an alpha channel, this field will be set (if you will be saving a Picture with an alpha channel, set this flag prior to initialisation and build the channel using the object provided in the Mask field).

If the picture source includes an alpha channel mask, it will normally be separated out and stored in the Mask field. If you set the FORCE_ALPHA_32 option before loading, the image will be forced into 32-bit graphics mode with alpha channel. The mask information will be stored in the alpha byte and the Mask field will not be set.
Prevents automatic loading of the picture image. Use the Query action to process the picture header or Activate to load the image data.
A mask has been generated for the image.
Indicates that the picture image will be created from scratch.
Automatically upgrade palette based images to 32 bit colour.
This read-only flag is automatically set if the image source is scalable (such as SVG).
